title: CodeBloom
description: An online code editor for web developers(HTML, CSS, JavaScript) that can help you with your code by providing a live preview of your code.

title: MusicPlayer
description: A music player with a modern UI and a responsive design that can play music from your local library.

title: Attendance System
description: An attendance system that can be used to mark attendance of students in a class.

title: Todo App
description: A todo app with a modern UI and a responsive design that can be used to manage your tasks.

title: Image Gallery
description: A image gallery with a modern UI and a responsive design that can be used to view images.

title: Expense Tracker
description: A expense tracker with a modern UI and a responsive design that can be used to track your expenses.
